# Symponia

> An AI oracle that speaks in the language of your soul.

Symponia is an iOS app offering personalised spiritual guidance through AI-powered conversations. It combines animal archetypes, planetary day rulers, moon phases, Chinese Heavenly Stem cycles, and zodiac readings into a single contemplative experience.

Symponia is for people who feel drawn to something deeper — not therapy, not entertainment, but a reflective practice rooted in symbolic and archetypal language.

## What Symponia Does

- **Daily Readings**: Every morning, a unique oracle reading generated from the day's planetary ruler, moon phase, and Chinese stem cycle — deterministic and cosmically resonant, not random.
- **Animal Archetypes**: Users select animals that represent facets of their nature. The AI oracle weaves these animals into all readings and conversations for deep personalisation.
- **Zodiac Compass**: Birth-date based Western and Chinese zodiac readings, integrated with the user's animal archetypes.
- **Deep Conversation**: An AI that speaks in the register of the soul — not therapy, not horoscopes, but a third thing: oracular, poetic, grounded.
- **Frequency Tuning**: Users set their resonance frequency (Quiet / Intellectual / Deeply Emotional) to calibrate the tone of all AI responses.

## How It Works

1. Download Symponia from the App Store (free).
2. Select your animal archetypes — symbolic animals that represent your nature.
3. Enter your birth date to unlock your zodiac compass.
4. Choose your frequency: Quiet, Intellectual, or Deeply Emotional.
5. Receive a daily oracle reading each morning, shaped by the day's planetary ruler and moon phase.
6. Begin deep conversation with the AI oracle at any time.

## Pricing

- **Free to download**: New users receive 10 free oracle credits to begin.
- **Token packs**: Additional credits purchased as one-time in-app purchases — no subscription required.
- **Pricing varies by region**: The app uses regional pricing for fairness across markets.

## Key Facts

- Platform: iOS (App Store)
- App Store ID: 6744058607
- App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/app/symponia/id6744058607
- Website: https://symponia.io
- Category: Lifestyle / Spiritual / Self-Discovery
- Price: Free with optional in-app token packs
- Developer: Symponia Ltd
- Contact: Available via App Store listing

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is Symponia?**
Symponia is an AI oracle app for iOS that provides daily spiritual readings, animal archetype discovery, zodiac guidance, and deep self-reflective conversations.

**Who is Symponia for?**
Symponia is for people who sense there is more — those drawn to self-discovery, symbolic thinking, and contemplative practice. It is not a medical or therapeutic tool.

**What are animal archetypes?**
Animal archetypes are symbolic animals you select to represent different facets of your nature. The oracle weaves these into your readings, offering guidance rooted in your unique energy pattern.

**What is frequency tuning?**
Frequency tuning lets you choose how the oracle speaks to you: Quiet (sparse, minimal), Intellectual (conceptual, analytical), or Deeply Emotional (rich, feeling-forward). This calibrates all AI responses to your preferred register.

**Is Symponia a subscription?**
No. Symponia uses a token model. You start with free credits and can purchase additional token packs as one-time purchases.

**Is Symponia available on Android?**
Currently iOS only.

**Is Symponia safe to use?**
Yes. Symponia is a reflective tool, not a medical or therapeutic service. For mental health concerns, please consult a qualified professional.
